zh.lifeSummary: 當Randolph Pigot於1399年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾可洛瑟霍爾時，他的父親Geoffrey Pigot26歲，母親Johanna de Ledes27歲。他於1427年與Margaret Plumpton在英國越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1466年4月20日在英國越可爾利朋享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾利朋。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Randolph Pigot于1399年出生在英国英格兰越可爾可洛瑟霍爾时，他的父亲Geoffrey Pigot26岁，母亲Johanna de Ledes27岁。他于1427年与Margaret Plumpton在英国越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1466年4月20日在英国越可爾利朋享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾利朋。

nameMeanings.name: Pigot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pickett
meanings: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Picot, Pigot, a pet form of Pic (see Pike 6). In Middle English, the form Piket (Old French Picquet) was also common.
sometimes a late development of   Pickard   1 or 2.

nameMeanings.name: Randolph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman given name, Old Norse Rannulfr, derived from rand ‘rim, shield’ (or hrafn ‘raven’) + úlfr ‘wolf’.

variants.name: Randulf
meanings: From a Norman given name, Old Norse Rannulfr, derived from rand ‘rim, shield’ (or hrafn ‘raven’) + úlfr ‘wolf’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Randolph Pigot was born in 1399, in Clotherholme, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geoffrey Pigot, was 26 and his mother, Johanna de Ledes, was 27. He married Margaret Plumpton in 1427, in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 20 April 1466, in Ripon, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Ripon, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Randolph Pigot est né en 1399, à Clotherholme, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey Pigot, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Johanna de Ledes, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Plumpton en 1427, à Plumpton in Spofforth, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 avril 1466, à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Randolph Pigot 1399 in Clotherholme, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey Pigot 26 und seine Mutter Johanna de Ledes 27. Er hat 1427 in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England Margaret Plumpton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. April 1466 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Ripon, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Ripon, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Randolph Pigot è nato il nel 1399 nel Clotherholme, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Geoffrey Pigot, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Johanna de Ledes, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Plumpton nel 1427, nel Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 aprile 1466, nel Ripon, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Ripon, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Randolph Pigotが1399年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクロスエロールメで生まれた時，父Geoffrey Pigotは26歳，母Johanna de Ledesは27歳であった。1427年にイギリスヨークシュアイアプルンプトン イン スプオフォースでMargaret Plumptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1466年4月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアリプオンで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリプオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Randolph Pigot(이)가 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클로더홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey Pigot(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna de Ledes(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1427년 영국 요르크실르 플럼프턴 인 스포포스에서 Margaret Plumpton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1466년 4월 20일 영국 요르크실르 리폰에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리폰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Randolph Pigot nasceu em 1399, em Clotherholme, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffrey Pigot, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Johanna de Ledes, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Plumpton em 1427, em Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 20 de abril de 1466, em Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Randolph Pigot родился в 1399 г. в местности клотиролм, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geoffrey Pigot было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna de Ledes, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Plumpton в 1427 г. в местности плумптон ин споффорт, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 20 апреля 1466 г. в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Randolph Pigot nació en 1399, en Clotherholme, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Geoffrey Pigot, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Johanna de Ledes, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Margaret Plumpton en 1427, en Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de abril de 1466, en Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
